Client Feedback

What
Clients Are Saying

Real experiences from real clients — milestone moments, family sessions, run club coverage, and everything in between.

Featured Reviews
★★★★★

Lee is honestly one of the most personable and professional photographers I've worked with. He has a real eye for capturing moments, not just pictures. The kind of photos that take you right back to how you felt in that moment.

I first came across his work at a local run club where he was taking action shots of runners. And if you run, you already know not every moment looks great, but somehow he always managed to capture really good shots. That stood out to me.

So when I decided to do a photoshoot for my 40th birthday, I already knew I wanted to work with him. From the beginning, he was super patient and really took the time to listen to what I wanted. He gave feedback, but in a way that still kept my vision at the center of everything.

During the shoot, he made me feel so comfortable. He was guiding me the whole time, adjusting things as needed, and just making sure everything flowed. He helped build my confidence without it feeling forced. And when I got my photos back… I was blown away. Everything I hoped for and more.

I'm just really grateful for the whole experience. This was a big milestone for me, and he made it feel special from start to finish.

A
Ashley
Houston, TX · 40th Birthday Portrait Session
★★★★★

We had the absolute best experience with Lee Rivers. He photographed my 40th birthday and executed exactly what I envisioned — honestly, even better than I could have imagined.

From start to finish, Lee was incredibly responsive, professional, and thoughtful. He truly listened to what I wanted and cared about capturing the right moments and energy of the night. You can tell he takes real pride in his work.

On top of that, the turnaround time was unbelievably fast, and the photos are stunning — natural, vibrant, and full of life. He captured both the big moments and the subtle details in a way that made the entire event feel so special.

I would recommend Lee without hesitation to anyone looking for a photographer who is talented, reliable, and genuinely invested in delivering an exceptional experience.

E
Erika
Houston, TX · 40th Birthday Event Coverage
"He captured both the big moments and the subtle details in a way that made the entire event feel so special."
— Erika, Houston, TX
